plan_review_notes: Fix plan now matches the implemented metrics projection, MCP resource surface, and regression coverage.

plan_review_history.notes: Added repo-level value metrics projection, repo://status/metrics MCP resource, board integration, and lifecycle instrumentation for manual intervention plus reopen-after-verify signals.
Fix plan now matches the implemented metrics projection, MCP resource surface, and regression coverage.

spec_review_notes: Scope frozen to repo metrics projection, MCP read surface, and minimal lifecycle instrumentation for required value signals.

normal_cases.name: Repo metrics resource reports session resume time, promotion lead time, and manual intervention count from persisted state and event logs

edge_cases.name: Parent merge retarget still blocks stacked children and now also emits reopen/manual-intervention signals without regressing the existing promotion flow

exception_cases.name: Missing or partial event history leaves metrics empty rather than fabricating values

verification_methods.target: Repo metrics resource reports session resume time, promotion lead time, and manual intervention count from persisted state and event logs
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_sisyphus tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_event_bus

verification_methods.target: Missing or partial event history leaves metrics empty rather than fabricating values
